Interface RoleManager

All Known Implementing Classes:
JPARoleManager
public interface RoleManager
Interface defining operations for managing user roles.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    createRole(Role role)
    Creates a new role in the system.
    void
    delateRole(Integer id)
    Deletes a role from the system by its ID.
    Role
    findRoleById(Integer id)
    Finds a role by its ID.
    Role
    findRoleByName(String roleName)
    Finds a role by its name.
    List<Role>
    getAllRoles()
    Retrieves all roles in the system.
    void
    updateRole(Role role)
    Updates an existing role in the system.

  • Method Details

    • createRole

      void createRole(Role role)
      Creates a new role in the system.
      Parameters:
      role - the role object to create

    • findRoleByName

      Role findRoleByName(String roleName)
      Finds a role by its name.
      Parameters:
      roleName - the name of the role
      Returns:
      the role object if found, null otherwise

    • findRoleById

      Role findRoleById(Integer id)
      Finds a role by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the role
      Returns:
      the role object if found, null otherwise

    • getAllRoles

      List<Role> getAllRoles()
      Retrieves all roles in the system.
      Returns:
      a list of all roles

    • updateRole

      void updateRole(Role role)
      Updates an existing role in the system.
      Parameters:
      role - the role object with updated information

    • delateRole

      void delateRole(Integer id)
      Deletes a role from the system by its ID.
      Parameters:
      id - the ID of the role to delete
